name: Chewy Peanut Butter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate, peanut butter, and margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Pour in the melted chocolate mixture and stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add flour to the batter, mixing well.
5. Fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Grease an 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
From "The Ultimate Peanut Butter Cookbook" by Arthur Boze
